warming_air.label: Air warming (recent baseline)
warming_air.description: Air temperature anomaly recorded at 2 meters above the surface for 2025 relative to the 1979-1988 average.

warming_vs_preindustrial_air.label: Air warming (pre-industrial)
warming_vs_preindustrial_air.description: Air temperature anomaly recorded at 2 meters above the surface for 2021-2025 relative to the 1850-1900 pre-industrial baseline.

warming_sst.label: Sea-surface warming
warming_sst.description: Sea-surface temperature anomaly for 2025 relative to the 1982-1991 average.

reef_stress.label: Coral heat-stress trend
reef_stress.description: Trend in annual coral heat stress (DHW risk score) from 1985 to 2025; higher values indicate faster increases.

precipitation_trend.label: Annual precipitation trend
precipitation_trend.description: Trend in annual total precipitation (mm/year) from 1979 to 2025; blue = wetter, orange = drier.

cdd_trend.label: Dry-spell trend
cdd_trend.description: Trend in maximum consecutive dry days per year (days/year); warm colors = longer dry spells.

wet_days_trend.label: Wet-day trend
wet_days_trend.description: Trend in number of wet days per year (days/year); blue = more wet days.

rx5day_trend.label: Heavy-rain trend
rx5day_trend.description: Trend in maximum 5-day precipitation total per year (mm/year); blue = heavier extreme rain.
